pkgmetadata.longdescription: phpLDAPadmin (PLA) is a web-based LDAP data management tool for system administrators. It is a complete rewrite (v2) of the classic phpLDAPadmin, built on Laravel 12 and PHP 8.4. It supports OpenLDAP, 389 Directory Server, OpenDJ, Apache DS, and OpenBSD ldapd, and is compliant with LDAP RFCs.
